headline: Mario Gabelli Backs Watts Water Technologies (WTS) on Building Efficiency Trends
summary: Watts Water Technologies Inc. (NYSE:WTS) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Mario Gabelli. Watts Water Technologies Inc. (NYSE:WTS) is the 11th-largest holding for GAMCO Investors, and the fund’s 13F filings as of the end of Q4 2025 indicate it has reduced its position in the stock by around 3.5% versus last […]
